}

}' '[http://192.168.166.14:11000/TimescaleProviderService/api/summaries/filtered'](http://192.168.166.14:11000/TimescaleProviderService/api/summaries/filtered')

---

The Mean values is the arithmetic average of the values. Note that when using intervals the value at the end of the interval is not counted if the last interval is full. If not full - the value is counted in the calculations.
